tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Windows down on a two-lane road
Summer sun painting fields of gold
Your hand on mine, radio on low
Nowhere to be and everywhere to go

[Pre-Chorus]
Maybe we're just two hearts running free
Maybe this is where we're meant to be

[Chorus]
Highway hearts, we're chasing the sun
Mile after mile, never coming undone
Highway hearts, under Texas sky
Just you and me and a beautiful drive
Highway hearts

[Verse 2]
Gas station coffee, half past two
Polaroid photo, me and you
Small town diners and neon signs
Living for these warm summer nights

[Pre-Chorus]
Maybe we're just two hearts running free
Maybe this is where we're meant to be

[Chorus]
Highway hearts, we're chasing the sun
Mile after mile, never coming undone
Highway hearts, under Texas sky
Just you and me and a beautiful drive
Highway hearts

[Bridge]
When the road runs out, we'll find another one
When the stars come out, we're just getting begun
You and I, we don't need a plan
Just the highway and your hand

[Outro]
Highway hearts, highway hearts
Keep on driving, keep on driving

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Lagos nights, city never sleeps
Neon lights dancing on the street
Your body moving like the ocean breeze
Something in the air got me on my knees

[Pre-Chorus]
The DJ spinning, the crowd is thin
But you and I, we're about to begin

[Chorus]
Midnight in Lagos, you move like fire
Every step you take is taking me higher
Midnight in Lagos, under the moon
The rhythm of your hips got me lost in the groove
Lagos, Lagos, midnight

[Verse 2]
Palm wine dripping, the bass is low
Victoria Island in the afterglow
Your eyes like diamonds in the city light
You're the only one I see tonight

[Chorus]
Midnight in Lagos, you move like fire
Every step you take is taking me higher
Midnight in Lagos, under the moon
The rhythm of your hips got me lost in the groove
Lagos, Lagos, midnight

[Bridge]
Don't stop the music
Don't kill the vibe
As long as you're beside me
We'll dance all night

[Outro]
Midnight Lagos, midnight Lagos
Feel the rhythm, feel the rhythm

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Five AM alarm, no snooze today
Building empires while they sleep away
Coffee black, mindset sharp as steel
Turning every dream into something real
They laughed when I started from the ground
Now the only way I'm going is up, no looking down

Every no just made me stronger
Every wall just made me hungrier

[Chorus]
Empire state of mind, I'm building mine
Brick by brick, line by line
Empire state, no time to wait
Grind today, dominate
This is the hustle, this is the way
Empire state, empire state

[Verse 2]
Laptop open, spreadsheets and dreams
Side hustle turned to million-dollar streams
While they scroll I'm making moves that count
Every failure's just a stepping stone to the mount
Self-made, no hand-outs, no debate
Winners find a way, that's empire state

[Chorus]
Empire state of mind, I'm building mine
Brick by brick, line by line
Empire state, no time to wait
Grind today, dominate
This is the hustle, this is the way
Empire state, empire state

[Bridge]
Started with a vision and a WiFi connection
Now they study my direction
Call it luck? Nah, call it dedication
Empire state, next generation

[Outro]
Empire state, empire state
Keep building, keep grinding
